content: Serana: You ever wake up after a night of hardcore threesome debauchery and just crave a stiff drink? Or are you too busy polishing your helmet to indulge in the pleasures of life? Ivarstead Guard: We don’t all spend our nights sword-fucking vampires and swapping bodily fluids, lady. Some of us actually patrol these roads. Serana: Oh please, don’t act like you haven’t been bent over a barrel by your fellow guardsmen after a long shift. Dibella demands indulgence, and Skyrim— —well, Skyrim . Saw your boys by the stables last night, looking like they were ready to rut like beasts. Ivarstead Guard: At least I’m not the one dreaming about alien demons splitting me open like a ripe melon. Heard you whispering about that in your sleep. Disturbing shit, vampire. Serana: Sweetheart, after centuries buried alive, is all that kept me sane. And MJR? Oh, he when I share . Just last night, while Lydia whimpered beneath me, I described exactly how much I want Xenomorph seed dripping down my thighs. Ivarstead Guard: Gods save me from your depravity. Just keep it away from the shrine of Talos. Last thing we need is you corrupting pilgrims mid-prayer. Serana: Oh, but corruption’s . Tell me—when was the last time you let loose? Bet you haven’t been properly railed since before this pathetic civil war started. Ivarstead Guard: Unlike , I don’t measure my worth by how many cocks I swallow before breakfast. Now move along—unless you me to report your public indecency to the Jarl. Serana: Mm, threats. How conservative. Don’t worry, darling—MJR’s waiting, and unlike your limp-wristed patrols, he

Ivarstead Guard: By the Divines, just... go back to your degenerate escapades before I lose my breakfast. I don't get paid enough to listen to this. Serana: Suit yourself, sweetroll. Just remember—next time you're on night watch, staring at the stars and gripping your sword a little too tight... you'll be thinking about me.
